creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Just a reminder.
Can somebody look in to this and fix it? I upgraded another bunch of 
servers and the problem remains:

# mrtg --check
overload arg '..' is invalid at 
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/Math/BigInt.pm line 153.
Usage: mrtg <config-file>

# uname -srmi
FreeBSD 8.4-RELEASE-p7 amd64 GENERIC

perl5-5.16.3_8
